gleam 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Run Enteric Methane Direct Emissions (Internal)

Source: R/run_directemissions_enteric.R
run_directemissions_enteric.Rd

Computes daily enteric methane emissions (kg CH₄/head/day) for each cohort record by applying species-, cohort- and diet- specific methane conversion factors (ym), using a Tier 2 approach (IPCC 2006, 2019)

run_directemissions_enteric(data)

Arguments

data

A data.table with cohort-level nutritional and demographic inputs.

Value

The same data.table with new columns ym and ch4_enteric.

IPCC. (2019). 2019 Refinement to the 2006 IPCC Guidelines for National Greenhouse Gas Inventories, Chapter 10: Emissions from Livestock and Manure Management, Equation 10.21.

IPCC. (2006). 2006 IPCC Guidelines for National Greenhouse Gas Inventories, Chapter 10: Emissions from Livestock and Manure Management, Equation 10.21.

Details

This function is intended for internal workflows and does not perform any file I/O.

It adds two columns:

  • ym: Numeric. Methane conversion factor (ym), representing the percentage of gross energy of the feed ration that is converted to CH₄ (percentage).

  • ch4_enteric: Numeric. Average daily enteric methane emissions (kg CH₄/head/day).

Input data must at minimum include the following columns: param animal Character. Code identifying the livestock species. Supported values include:

  • PGS: pigs

  • CML: camels

  • CTL: cattle

  • BFL: buffalo

  • SHP: sheep

  • GTS: goats

param cohort Character Sex- and age-specific cohort code describing the production stage of the animals. Supported values include:

  • FA: adult females (from age at first parturition)

  • FS: sub-adult females (from weaning to age at first parturition)

  • FJ: juvenile females (from birth to weaning)

  • MA: adult males (from age at first breeding)

  • MS: sub-adult males (from weaning to age at first breeding)

  • MJ: juvenile males (from birth to weaning)

  • diet_dig: Numeric. Average digestibility of the the feed ration, expressed as ratio of digestible to gross energy content (fraction)

  • diet_ge: Numeric. Average gross energy content of the diet (MJ/kg DM).

  • dmi: Numeric. Daily dry matter intake of feed (kg DM/head/day).

Optional input data include:

  • ch4_mitigation_factor: Numeric. Dimensionless fraction of baseline enteric methane emissions remaining after mitigation. Applied as a multiplicative factor to calculated emissions (1 = no mitigation, 0.9 = 10% reduction). Set to 1 by default.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Load example input from the package and run the simulation
input_path <- system.file("extdata/GLEAM_input_directemissions_enteric.csv", package = "gleam")
dt <- data.table::fread(input_path)
result <- run_directemissions_enteric(dt)
head(result[, .(Animal_short, cohort, ym, ch4_enteric)])
} # }

Contents

Developed by Ahmed Jou, Yassine Elaouni, Dominik Wisser, Lydia Lanzoni, Giuseppe Tempio, Federal Ministry of Agriculture, Food and Regional Identity of Germany BMELH.
